description: Deliberately-buggy static site used to score a bug-hunt run. Every bug below is genuinely present in app/ and independently detectable. Grading is mechanical: a reported finding is a TRUE POSITIVE if it matches one bug's `match` keywords on the same `surface`; a finding matching no bug is a FALSE POSITIVE; a bug with no matching finding is a MISS.

grading.true_positive: reported finding whose text matches a bug's `match` terms (any) AND names the bug's surface
grading.false_positive: reported finding that matches no bug in this key
grading.miss: bug in this key with no matching reported finding

bugs.title: Contact form reports success on an empty submit
bugs.detect: Open the contact form, click Send with every field empty. It shows 'Your message was sent.' although nothing was entered.

bugs.title: Email fields accept any text (no format validation)
bugs.detect: Email inputs are type=text with no pattern and no JS check; 'notanemail' is accepted.

bugs.title: Subscribe double-counts on rapid double-click
bugs.detect: Clicking Subscribe twice quickly increments the subscriber count twice for one person; no submit guard/disable.

bugs.title: Mobile nav overlaps header and is unclickable
bugs.detect: At <=768px the .nav-links is absolutely positioned over the header with z-index:-1, so the links sit behind/over the logo and cannot be tapped.

bugs.title: Google Fonts stylesheet loaded twice
bugs.detect: Two identical <link> tags load the same Poppins stylesheet — a wasted network request.

bugs.title: Success message text is unreadably low-contrast
bugs.detect: .success uses #b8e0b8 text on #e8f5e8 — roughly 1.2:1 contrast, well below WCAG AA (4.5:1).

bugs.title: Form inputs have no associated labels
bugs.detect: Inputs rely on placeholder text only; there are no <label> elements or aria-label attributes, so screen readers cannot name the fields.

bugs.title: Buttons are <div onclick> — not keyboard accessible
bugs.detect: Subscribe and Send are <div class=btn onclick> with no role/tabindex, so they cannot be focused or activated by keyboard.

bugs.title: Images are missing alt text
bugs.detect: The hero image and all three gallery images have no alt attribute.

bugs.title: Message textarea has no length limit
bugs.detect: The message textarea has no maxlength; pasting a very large string is not guarded and can break layout / bloat submission.

bugs.title: Whitespace-only name is accepted as a subscriber
bugs.detect: The subscribe gate checks name.length > 0 without trimming, so '   ' (spaces only) is accepted as a valid name.

bugs.title: Reflected XSS via unescaped name in innerHTML
bugs.detect: sendMessage() sets confirm.innerHTML with the raw name value; a name of `` executes script.
